name: Tax Lien Subordination

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must show that subordination will ultimately help pay the tax debt (e.g., obtaining a loan to improve property value or pay down the tax).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The IRS may subordinate its tax lien to a new loan (like a refinance) if it increases the ultimate amount realizable by the government or facilitates tax collection.
